text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and was published at ICML 2016 (Proceedings of the 33rd International Conference on Machine Learning) by Moritz Hardt, Benjamin Recht, and Yoram Singer — matching the cited authors and venue exactly. The only error in the reference is a typo in the title: "decent" instead of "descent."
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v48/hardt16.html
